wpSpineCondition.title: Spinal Infections & Tuberculosis
wpSpineCondition.content: Spinal infections occur when bacteria or tuberculosis affect the bones, discs, or surrounding spinal tissues. These infections may gradually damage the vertebrae and lead to pain, stiffness, or deformity. Symptoms can include persistent back pain, fever, fatigue, or weakness. Early diagnosis and treatment are important to prevent nerve damage and spinal instability.
